title: Youtube Poop: Mario's Severed Head Amuses You
description:
#73 - Most Discussed (Today) - Education
#8 - Top Favorites (Today) - Education
#23 - Top Rated (Today) - Education
#35 - Top Favorites (This Week) - Education
#68 - Top Rated (This Week) - Education

He-ey-ey-ey-ey-ey! Are you ready to sing a song for Mario?




Okay?



Special Thanks to ToadTitan for supplying the source videos.

Ever since seeing the first video that used this as a source I felt that I had to make a poop out of this, even if it was a short one. Because unlike many of the people who used it, I actually played Mario Teaches Typing when I was younger, and watching those videos was like a bit of hilarious little nostalgia back then.

Especially since I didn't realize just how creepy Mario's severed floating head was when I was younger.
